title: sambucus peruviana
intro: Sambucus peruviana, also known as the South American elderberry, is a flowering plant native to South America and is a member of the Adoxaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sambucus peruviana include relieving cold and flu symptoms, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Sambucus peruviana can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
